proposed_answer: Submit event requests through its accessibility channel, but direct facility-access questions to the host hotel.
proposed_question: How does Tethered Together route event accessibility requests versus questions about the facility itself?
reason: This preserves the page's two destinations without copying a personal email address or a volatile deadline.
support_evidence:
We want everyone to be able to enjoy Tethered Together. As such, the form below provides an avenue for attendees to provide information about their accessibility requests. Having as much information as possible will allow us the ability to fulfill reasonable requests.
If you have questions about the accessibility of the facility, please contact our host hotel.

proposed_answer: They can use the mobile app and either stream tutorials or download them to a device for on-the-go practice.
proposed_question: How can Shibari Study members access tutorials for practice away from a computer?
reason: This retains durable access modes while excluding prices, discounts, trial length, and promotional counts.
support_evidence: After signing up for a Shibari Study membership, you will have full access to the Shibari Study library of over 800 tutorials and regular live classes on our website and free mobile app as well as access to our exclusive member-only Discord community. These tutorials are available to stream as well as download on your device for on-the-go practice.

proposed_answer: Look for solid objects whose different parts can inspire and support different body shapes.
proposed_question: How does Rope365 suggest using furniture when designing a tie?
reason: This distills the creative method without implying that every nearby object is structurally suitable.
support_evidence: Tying people to objects brings infinite possibilities. Each piece of furniture enables us to create different shapes with the body. Look around you and find objects that inspire you: chairs, tables, sofas, desks, almost any piece of solid material can be a source of ideas.
